rows.prompt: A minimalist white chalk stick-figure of an office worker, with a simple round head and basic expressive facial features (dots for eyes, line for mouth), is walking alone in a dark office. Other stick figures are visible in the background, whispering and holding knives behind their backs. The entire scene is in a sketchy 2D chalkboard style on a dark green chalkboard.

mode_payload.description: A minimalist white chalk stick-figure of an office worker, with a simple round head and basic expressive facial features (dots for eyes, line for mouth), is walking alone in a dark office. Other stick figures are visible in the background, whispering and holding knives behind their backs. The entire scene is in a sketchy 2D chalkboard style on a dark green chalkboard.

rows.prompt: A minimalist white chalk stick-figure of an office worker, with a simple round head and basic expressive facial features, is watching two other stick figures aggressively tearing apart a piece of paper with a large dollar sign on it. The scene is in a sketchy 2D chalkboard style on a dark green chalkboard.

rows.prompt: A minimalist white chalk stick-figure of an office worker, with a simple round head and basic expressive facial features, is hunched over, carrying a massive, impossibly tall stack of chalk-drawn folders on his back, looking utterly exhausted. Other stick figures sit nearby, casually drinking coffee, in a sketchy 2D chalkboard style on a dark green chalkboard.

rows.prompt: A minimalist white chalk stick-figure of an office worker, with a simple round head and basic expressive facial features, is walking away calmly after putting his hands in his pockets. He is turning his back away from a screaming, angry stick figure. The scene is in a sketchy 2D chalkboard style on a dark green chalkboard.

rows.prompt: A minimalist white chalk stick-figure of an office worker, with a simple round head and basic expressive facial features, is sitting cross-legged in a meditative pose. Chaotic chalk scribbles and noise lines surround him, but he is glowing slightly, in a sketchy 2D chalkboard style on a dark green chalkboard.
